confidence.method: Real upstream RealTimePredictionEngine.generate_predictions()'s own model_agreement field: max(0, 1 - dispersion/0.1), dispersion = std(xgboost_pred, lightgbm_pred) — called directly, not reimplemented. Measures cross-model prediction agreement, not a calibrated probability.

q1.explanation: XGBoost+LightGBM ensemble (upstream's SimpleEnsemble, freshly trained on AAPL's own 3y trailing yfinance history ending at real run time — not windowed to context.as_of='2024-01-15', see adapter header/_train_ensemble docstring for this pre-existing limitation — no pretrained Kaggle-sourced artifacts were available) predicts a 5-day forward return of +0.4959%, against a transaction-cost-based signal threshold of 0.1500%. Model agreement (upstream's own RealTimePredictionEngine.generate_predictions() model_agreement) is 0.77. Real upstream confidence interval (generate_predictions()): [-1.8158%, +2.8076%].

confidence.method: Same model_agreement measure as Q1Action.confidence — real upstream RealTimePredictionEngine.generate_predictions()'s own model_agreement (1 - normalised XGBoost/LightGBM prediction dispersion) — reused here since it applies to the same ensemble prediction underlying this signal.

evidence.source: XGBoost feature_importances_ (upstream AdvancedMLFramework.create_xgboost_model(), freshly trained this run)

q3.explanation: Ensemble predicts a 5-day forward return of +0.4959% for AAPL (model agreement 0.77); same 3y-trailing, real-run-time-windowed training data as Q1Action (see that method's docstring for the point-in-time limitation). Confidence interval: [-1.8158%, +2.8076%].
